result.question:
仓储库位分配(SLAP/slotting)的"场景→算法匹配"问题深度研究,三个子问题:

【1. 策略分类学与标准术语】仓储 storage assignment 策略的完整学术分类:经典三族(randomized / class-based / full-turnover-based storage,Hausman-Schwarz-Graves 1976 起)、规则类(Closest Open Location、COI cube-per-order index、duration-of-stay、correlated/affinity storage 等)、现代类(元启发式 GA/ALNS、精确 MIP/LAP、学习型 DRL)。每个策略给:标准英文学术名+中文惯用译名+奠基文献+一句话适用前提。特别要:我们现有五策略的正名——①随机可行位 ②固定扫描序第一可行位(sequential/first-fit?) ③行程时间最小可行位(Closest Open Location?) ④多准则加权评分在线选位 ⑤批量排序分配+局部搜索(Rank-and-Assign类)——这五个在文献里的准确对应名称。

【2. 场景→策略占优的实证知识】什么仓库/需求特征决定哪个策略占优:需求偏斜度(ABC curve shape / demand skewness)、填充率(space utilization)、批量可见性(在线逐件 vs 批量已知)、SKU 数与库位比、出入库比例。找系统性对比研究:Hausman/Graves 解析结论(class-based 接近 full-turnover 的条件)、Petersen 系列仿真对比、Gu et al. 2007 / de Koster 2007 / Reyes 2019 综述里的策略对比结论、以及"需求偏斜低时简单规则追平复杂优化"这类结论的文献出处。有定量结论(百分比)的优先。

【3. 算法选择/自适应切换的先例】Algorithm Selection Problem(Rice 1976)与 per-instance algorithm selection 在组合优化的应用(SATzilla、AutoFolio、Kerschke 2019 survey);仓储领域"根据批次画像/工况切换 slotting 策略"的论文、工业实践(dynamic slotting 产品如 Lucas/Manhattan/Blue Yonder 的场景管理逻辑)、学生竞赛或数模竞赛里做过"多工况策略切换"的方案;Müller et al. 2022 EJOR 仓储策略选择论文的具体方法与结论细化(特征、选择器形式、增益幅度)。

背景:我们是 20列×20层 AS/RS 单堆垛机,货物五属性(重量/频次/体积等),已有五策略+30seed 统计框架,要建"场景检测器+策略库"(按批次画像自动选算法,最终蒸馏成 PLC 结构化文本 if-else)。研究目的:①策略库候选补全(还缺哪些值得实现的)②检测器的特征与规则有文献依据③报告术语全部学术正名。搜索 agent 请用低档模型多派;证据要求:一手文献/官方文档优先,给 URL,区分"已核对原文/摘要级";找不到的点如实标注。

refuted.claim: HSG 1976 explicitly treats random assignment as operationally similar to the closest-open-location (COL) rule used by then-operating systems — i.e., in the founding paper COL is modeled as equivalent to randomized storage, not as a distinct optimization policy. This bears directly on the correct academic naming of the user's strategy ① (random feasible location) vs ③ (travel-time-minimizing feasible location, which is literal COL): the two are conflated in this source under high space utilization.

On class-based vs full-turnover storage: Petersen et al. (2004) simulation shows full-turnover storage outperforms class-based storage on travel distance in manual order picking, but 2-4 classes are recommended in practice for ease of implementation and administration; for AS/RS specifically, Yang (1988) and Van den Berg and Gademann (2000) found 6 classes best in their studies. The review adds that class-based storage requires more rack space than randomized storage (Graves et al. 1977) because empty slots must be available per class region.

Kallina & Lynn (1976) report that the cube-per-order index (COI, abbreviated 'CPO' in the original) rule is not merely a heuristic: the stock-location problem class posed by Heskett can be formulated as a linear program, and the COI rule is exactly the optimal solution of that LP (the proof is attributed to prior work by one of the authors, i.e., Kallina, and summarized in this paper). This is the standard citation establishing COI optimality for dedicated storage under linear travel-cost assumptions.

Reyes et al. (2019) attribute the three classic storage-policy families — random storage, dedicated storage, class-based storage — to Hausman et al. (1976), and attribute two additional rule policies (closest-free-space and inventory-rotation/turnover) to Gómez et al. (2008); the paper defines closest-free-space as prioritizing available locations at shorter distance from reception/dispatch areas, i.e. the policy family matching the user's strategy ③ (Closest Open Location).

【摘要级/二手确认,未核对付费全文】该综述将 SLAP 按信息可得性分层分类:item information(单件信息完全已知→对应 dedicated 类)、product information(仅产品级聚合信息→对应 class-based/duration-of-stay 类)、no information(无信息→对应 random/closest-open-location 类);其中 SLAP/Product-Information 情形定义为:件与件可互换、单件到达/离开时刻不再预先可知、仅有历史订单或聚合统计。这直接对应研究问题中'批量可见性(在线逐件 vs 批量已知)决定策略族'的文献依据。

The review enumerates a canonical list of named storage policies used in the 2005-2017 SLAP literature: class-based (CB), cube-per-order index (COI), correlation-based assignment (CoB), full turnover-based storage (TOB), random-based (RB), shared-based (SB), dedicated storage (DSP), closest-open location (COL), duration-of-stay based (DSB), and frequency-based (FB), plus assignment rules (horizontal/vertical/upper-lower assignment, fuzzy rules) and newer proposals (rearrange-while-working, autonomous-cell-based, energy-consumption-based). This directly supplies the standard English names for a strategy library: the user's strategy ① maps to random-based storage, ③ to closest-open location (COL), and duration-of-stay (DSB) appears as a distinct named policy (used by Meneghetti & Monti 2013/2014 and Chen et al. 2010 per Table 7). [已核对原文全文]

The review attributes the classic policy-family classification to Hausman et al. (1976) — random storage, dedicated storage, and class-based storage as 'most representative' — and defines the closest-free-space policy (locations at shorter distances from reception/dispatch prioritized, attributed to Gómez et al. 2008) and inventory-rotation policy (higher-sales items stored closest to reception/dispatch) as additional families. This confirms Hausman et al. 1976 as the foundational reference for the classic three families and gives a citable definition matching the user's strategy ③ (closest open location). [已核对原文全文]

The review explicitly identifies the design of dynamic storage policies (especially in automated systems, citing Chen et al. 2010), performance testing of different solution types depending on each warehouse's configuration (citing Boysen & Stephan 2013), and machine-learning/AI-based decision-support tools as open future-research directions as of 2018 — i.e., 'scenario-dependent policy selection' was flagged as a gap, not solved territory, in this literature through 2017, which supports the novelty framing of a scenario-detector + strategy-library approach. [已核对原文全文]

综述转述 Hausman, Schwarz & Graves (1976, Management Science 22(6):629-638) 的解析结论:当货物以整托盘(full pallets / unit-load)出入时,Closest Open Location 与 random storage 性能相同——对我们的启示:单元货载 AS/RS 场景下策略①(随机可行位)与就近选位在长期性能上可能不可区分,策略③若按行程时间最小选位应与 COL 明确区分命名。[综述级转述,Hausman 原文未直接核对]

场景→策略占优条件(综述转述):Guo & de Koster (2015/2016, IJPR 54(8)) 证明 turnover-based(full-turnover)的平均单程行驶距离并非仓库的下界,原因是空间共享——shared/haphazard 存储所需空间仅约为 turnover-based 的三分之二(almost two third),空间需求差异反过来影响平均行程;且 Muppani & Adil (2008b, Omega 36(4)) 观察到 SKU 库存水平波动大的系统中 class-based 优于 dedicated——即填充率/空间利用与库存波动性是决定共享类策略反超专用类策略的两个文献依据特征。[综述级转述]
